_meta.description: Local income tax jurisdictions (~15-20 cities/counties). Only jurisdictions with meaningful local income taxes on wages are included.

new-york-city.name: New York City
new-york-city.notes: NYC resident tax on top of NY state tax. Applies to all residents regardless of where income is earned.

yonkers.name: Yonkers
yonkers.notes: Residents pay 16.75% surcharge on NY state tax. Non-residents pay 0.5% on wages earned in Yonkers.

philadelphia.name: Philadelphia
philadelphia.notes: Philadelphia Wage Tax. Residents pay 3.75%; non-residents earning in Philadelphia pay 3.4481%. Applies to wages only.

detroit.name: Detroit
detroit.notes: Detroit City Income Tax. 2.4% for residents, 1.2% for non-residents.

columbus.name: Columbus
columbus.notes: Columbus city income tax 2.5%. Ohio municipalities commonly levy 2–2.5%.

baltimore-city.name: Baltimore City
baltimore-city.notes: Maryland county/city taxes range from 2.25% to 3.2% on top of state tax. Baltimore City is 3.2%.

kansas-city.name: Kansas City
kansas-city.notes: Kansas City earns tax — 1% on income earned in Kansas City.

portland-metro.name: Portland Metro / Multnomah County
portland-metro.notes: Portland Metro SHS (Supportive Housing Services) tax: 1% on income over $125k single / $200k MFJ. Multnomah County Preschool for All: 1.5% over $125k, 3% over $250k (single). Complex; verify current thresholds.

denver.name: Denver
denver.notes: Occupational privilege tax: $5.75/month ($69/year) flat. Applies to any employee working in Denver.

wilmington.name: Wilmington
wilmington.notes: Wilmington city wage tax 1.25% residents, 1.125% non-residents.
